title: Tenacious-Bench v0.1 Task Schema
description: Defines the structure for a single task in the Tenacious Benchmark, designed to be machine-verifiable.

task_id.description: A unique identifier for the benchmark task (e.g., 'TB-001-F2.3').

task_type.description: The type of task being evaluated.

difficulty.description: The estimated difficulty of the task.

inputs.description: The data provided to the agent to perform the task.

expected_output.description: A representation of the ideal output, used for scoring.

json_valid.description: MUST the output be a valid JSON object with 'subject' and 'body' keys?

body_contains.description: An array of substrings that MUST be present in the email body.

body_not_contains.description: An array of substrings that MUST NOT be present in the email body (for checking tone drift, etc.).

must_include_booking_link.description: MUST the email body contain the booking link?

scoring_rubric.description: Defines how to calculate the final score based on the expected_output.
